info.name: Apigee API Management
info.description:
APIs for programmatically managing Apigee organizations, API proxies, products, developers, apps, environments, deployments, and analytics. Provides full lifecycle management of APIs on the Apigee platform.

Contact Support:
 Name: Google Cloud Apigee

item.name: Apigee Get an API Proxy Revision

variable.description: (Required) Revision number of the API proxy.

request.description: Gets an API proxy revision. Returns the configuration and metadata for the specified revision of an API proxy.

response.name: Successful response with API proxy revision details

item.name: Apigee Deploy an API Proxy Revision

query.description: Set to true to force deployment of the new revision over the currently deployed revision by overriding conflict checks.
Set to true to enable sequenced rollout, which deploys to pods in a gradual manner.

variable.description: (Required) Revision number of the API proxy.

request.description: Deploys a revision of an API proxy to an environment. After deployment, the API proxy revision can accept requests from clients.

response.name: Successful response with deployment details
